data.body:
"The west" ??

The only significant EU sanction on Cuba is a weapons ban. EU exporters are protected from secondary US sanctions. They are Cuba's primary trading partner.

They don't sell oil to CUBA, but most EU countries are net importers.

data.body:
今天美国股市又创新高。据分析，股市跌了5%-10%后能11天创新高，这是1928年以来首次！

1929年10月，著名经济学家欧文·费雪(Irving Fisher)曾感慨道：股价已经立足于像永恒的高地上。没多久，股市崩溃，大萧条来临。

世界就是这么难以捉摸。
